title: Select VFX Studio
description: Built a high-performance website for a global visual effects and post-production studio specializing in films, OTT platforms, commercials, and gaming. Delivered a visually immersive experience with smooth animations and a modern, cinematic design language.

title: The Sea Learning
description: Engineered a scalable e-learning platform featuring a robust backend architecture and responsive frontend. Handled complex course management, secure user authentication, and optimized content delivery for a seamless educational experience.

title: CloudQlobe
description: Developed a high-performance, SEO-optimized frontend for a cloud communications platform. Focused on delivering sleek, intuitive dashboards and a seamless user experience tailored for modern enterprise telecom services.

title: One Hand Blackjack
description: Engineered a responsive, browser-based blackjack game leveraging WebGL and Canvas. Implemented smooth animations, real-time betting mechanics, and a highly polished UI to deliver an engaging casino experience across desktop and mobile devices.

title: The Way of the Dead
description: Developed an immersive 5x3 Ancient Egyptian-themed browser slot game featuring thrilling Lock & Win mechanics, Free Spins, and Jackpots. Engineered dynamic spin animations and expanding symbol logic using PixiJS and WebGL to ensure a high-fidelity casino experience.
